name: Catharine Merigold
background: Ms. Merigold has served as a director since 2015. She is the founder and a Managing Partner of Vista Ventures, a venture capital firm.

company_affiliations.name: AeroVironment, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Member, Board of Directors (also serves as Lead Independent Director and Chair of the Nominating and Governance Committee)
